repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: prior strict SCM/ASCM/SDiD/MC span-lattice proposal with observable certificates

published_prior_art.cite: DoudchenkoImbens2016, BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021, ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021, AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 define individual optimizers, not an adjacent Riesz-Schur zero-test

repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: strict span lattice for SCM/ASCM/SDiD/MC in a single-shock bounded-rank panel

published_prior_art.cite: AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 and AtheyBayatiImbensQu2019 compare MC/SC panel methods but do not give an iff ATT-equality lattice

repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: minimal-witness strictness conjecture for the same estimator chain

published_prior_art.cite: BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021 and AbadieLHour2021 discuss imperfect fit/penalization, not minimal noncorner rank-r witnesses for all adjacent pairs

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship iff-frontier cites AbadieDiamondHainmueller2010, DoudchenkoImbens2016, BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021, ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021, AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021, and AtheyBayatiImbensQu2019 without section/equation/page anchors.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal misses AtheyImbensQuViviano2025/TROP, a closer 2025 comparator combining low-rank outcome structure, unit weights, and time weights against TWFE, SC, MC, and SDiD.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The generic open-set lattice promises all three adjacent strict inclusions, but §9 gives an explicit concrete route only for the SDiD-MC gap, not SCM-ASCM or ASCM-SDID.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: §6 defines phi_m(P,D)=ell_q(Y-Mhat^m), but Conjecture 1 uses phi_m(P,D;M) for all M in C_r(P,D) without defining how the method functional depends on the compatible completion M.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem invokes the rank-r completion Jacobian and C_r tangent geometry but omits Assumption rank from its hypotheses.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define phi_m(P,D;M), N_m, R_m, and K_b as explicit finite matrices/linear maps for each adjacent pair, and add Assumption rank to Theorem 1.
Add section/equation/page anchors for each flagship comparator, especially the SDiD weighting equations, ASCM augmentation formula, MC objective, and Doudchenko-Imbens restriction map.
Add explicit noncorner SCM-ASCM and ASCM-SDID witness matrices in §9 with determinant-ratio or projected-Riesz calculations parallel to the current SDiD-MC example.
Add AtheyImbensQuViviano2025/TROP to related work and explain why the proposed equality certificate is not subsumed by a combined low-rank/unit-weight/time-weight estimator.

recommended_next_step: Revise locally: repair the undefined phi_m(P,D;M) convention, add the missing rank hypothesis and witness matrices, and anchor the flagship comparator claims before re-review.
